notes.B0-01: Created /backend Node.js service skeleton with start/dev scripts and README.
notes.B0-02: Added .env loader, typed env validation, .env.example, and missing required env failures for DB/Redis commands.
notes.B0-03: Added /health, /ready, and /version. /health stays up without external dependencies; /ready reports dependency failures.
notes.B0-04: Added PostgreSQL pool client with connection timeout and URL redaction.
notes.B0-05: Added SQL migration runner with schema_migrations metadata, advisory lock, transactions, and checksum drift detection.
notes.B0-06: Added 000001_base_schema.sql for app runtime metadata and updated_at trigger.
notes.B0-07: Added Dockerfile and docker-compose.yml for app/db/redis with overrideable ports and resettable volumes. YAML validated locally; Docker CLI is not installed on this machine.
notes.B0-08: Added Redis client, readiness check, and queue enqueue/dequeue abstraction.
notes.B0-09: Added standard error envelope and tests for 400/401/403/404/409/500 plus invalid JSON.
notes.B0-10: Added request-id middleware and structured request logging without body/query/secrets.
notes.B0-11: Added maintained OpenAPI 3.1 document at /openapi.json plus npm run openapi:check for CI validation.
notes.B0-12: Formalized Node test runner with 12 passing tests covering system routes, env validation, error envelopes, request logging, and OpenAPI.
notes.B0-13: Added Backend CI workflow for npm ci, lint, OpenAPI check, tests, and build check.
notes.B0-14: Added staging smoke deploy script and staging compose/rollback docs. npm run staging:smoke verified /health and /version at http://127.0.0.1:3091.
notes.B1-01: Added users migration with normalized unique email, status, timestamps, soft-delete marker, and updated_at trigger.
notes.B1-02: Added admin_users migration separated from client users, with status, creator link, last_login_at, and unique normalized email.
notes.B1-03: Added scrypt password hash/verify helper with timing-safe comparison and wrong-password regression test.
notes.B1-04: Added POST /auth/register with input validation, duplicate email 409, password hashing, session issuance, and no password_hash response leakage.
notes.B1-05: Added POST /auth/login with generic invalid-credential 401 and separation from admin identities.
notes.B1-06: Added sessions migration plus access/refresh opaque token hashing, refresh rotation, logout revoke, expiry checks, and stale refresh rejection.
notes.B1-07: Added requireUser middleware with Bearer token parsing, invalid/expired/revoked token 401 handling, and /me integration.
notes.B1-08: Added GET /me returning sanitized current user only.
notes.B1-09: Added POST /admin/auth/login with admin-only identity lookup, last_login_at update, roles/permissions response, and user/admin swap tests.
notes.B1-10: Added RBAC migration for permissions, roles, role_permissions, admin_user_roles, and indexes/constraints.
notes.B1-11: Added requirePermission middleware with wildcard administrator support and 401/403 regression coverage.
notes.B1-12: Added GET /admin/me returning sanitized admin user, roles, and permissions without password_hash.
notes.B1-13: Added audit_logs migration with actor/resource/action indexes and actor ownership constraints.
notes.B1-14: Added audit writer with metadata redaction and critical vs non-critical failure behavior.
notes.B1-15: Added idempotent procurement/warehouse/support/operations/finance/risk/administrator permission seed in migration and npm run seed:rbac.
notes.B1-16: Added auth/RBAC/audit regression suite. npm run ci passes with 18/18 tests and OpenAPI 13 paths.
notes.B2-01: Added saved_links migration with user_id ownership, url length check, platform/status enums, per-user URL hash uniqueness, and indexes.
notes.B2-02: Added POST /links and GET /links with user auth, duplicate link handling, empty/invalid URL 400, and per-user scoping.
notes.B2-03: Added marketplace recognition for Taobao/Tmall, 1688, Weidian/Micro, Yupoo, and Other with invalid URL errors.
notes.B2-04: Added POST /links/:id/parse with queue handoff. Queue failures keep the link and mark status failed with parse_error.
notes.B2-05: Added PATCH /links/:id for user-owned link details with title/spec/price/quantity/note validation and 404 for other users.
notes.B2-06: Added haul_items migration with user_id and saved_link_id ownership, status enum, unique per-user saved link, and indexes.
notes.B2-07: Added POST /links/:id/add-to-haul with required title/spec/price/quantity validation and duplicate-safe existing response.
notes.B2-08: Added GET /haul-items with user-only results and validated status filtering.
notes.B2-09: Added purchase_orders migration with user/item relationships, status enum, unique per-user haul item, and no public internal_notes exposure.
notes.B2-10: Added POST /purchase-orders requiring own waiting_purchase item, duplicate-safe idempotent response, item status update, and audit event.
notes.B2-11: Added GET /orders and GET /orders/:id with user scoping, 404 for other users, and sanitized response.
notes.B2-12: Added order_status_history migration and submit-order history creation for status traceability.
notes.B2-13: Added policy_pages migration with unique policy_type, draft/published/archived status, seed copy, and indexes.
notes.B2-14: Added GET /policies returning published policies only and safe fallback copy when CMS is empty or unavailable.
notes.B2-15: Added client API adapter in app/app.js with login/register, sync/retry, CORS support, API-backed links/haul/orders/policies, and no silent local fallback for core actions.
notes.B3-01: Added local/memory storage adapter with configurable driver, bucket, root directory, and read/write object methods.
notes.B3-02: Added private HMAC signed URL helper with configurable TTL, signature verification, and /storage/private/:key serving without exposing bucket names.
notes.B3-03: Added warehouse_items migration linked to user, purchase_order, haul_item, received_at, weight, storage location, and storage days.
notes.B3-04: Added admin warehouse receive API with warehouse:write RBAC, idempotent repeated receive, and audit logging.
notes.B3-05: Added admin weight update API with kg/gram input normalization, >0 validation, 200kg guardrail, and audit logging.
notes.B3-06: Added qc_photos migration with owner, warehouse item, private storage key, sort order, content type, size, and uniqueness constraints.
notes.B3-07: Added admin QC photo upload API requiring 3-5 JPEG/PNG/WebP photos, 10MB per-photo cap, decoded size validation, private storage upload, and signed response URLs.
notes.B3-08: Added user QC list API scoped to the current user with short-lived signed photo URLs.
notes.B3-09: Added QC approve API requiring owned item, uploaded photos, warehouse weight, ready_to_ship status sync, and duplicate-safe approved response.
notes.B3-10: Added extra photo request API with per-user ownership and duplicate-safe open request behavior.
notes.B3-11: Added 90-day free storage deadline service using received_at and UTC-safe ISO dates.
notes.B3-12: Added warehouse storage status API returning received_at, free_until, days_left, expired, and no fake deadline when received_at is empty.
notes.B3-13: Connected client QC Center to live /qc/items, /qc/items/:id/approve, and /qc/items/:id/extra-photo APIs with signed photo rendering and storage chips.
notes.B4-01: Added shipping_lines migration with destination country, status, service level, billing rules, restriction rules, delivery windows, and indexes.
notes.B4-02: Added default shipping line seed data and npm run shipping-lines:import for idempotent JSON bulk import, covered by a 151-line import regression.
notes.B4-03: Added parcels migration with user ownership, reserved address_id, shipment status enum, final fee, chargeable weight, address, tracking number, and lifecycle timestamps.
notes.B4-04: Added parcel_items migration linking parcels to warehouse/haul items with an active-item uniqueness guard to prevent duplicate unpaid/active parcel reservations.
notes.B4-05: Added POST /parcels/draft requiring owned ready_to_ship warehouse items with weight, duplicate-safe same-item draft responses, and conflict handling for reserved items.
notes.B4-06: Added quote calculator for actual weight, volumetric weight, minimum chargeable weight, per-line billing rules, disabled lines, and explainable restriction failures.
notes.B4-07: Added POST /shipping/preview returning available quotes with quote ids and unavailable lines with reasons.
notes.B4-08: Added POST /parcels submit flow requiring a fresh matching quote and complete address; expired or mismatched quotes return 409.
notes.B4-09: Added shipping_payments migration with payment intent id, status, amount, currency, provider, and user idempotency key uniqueness.
notes.B4-10: Added POST /shipping-payments using backend parcel final_fee as source of truth and enforcing idempotency keys.
notes.B4-11: Added signed payment webhook handler with HMAC verification, event_id dedupe, amount mismatch protection, and paid parcel sync on succeeded payments.
notes.B4-12: Added tracking_events migration with parcel/user/status/time/location/message and admin creator linkage.
notes.B4-13: Added GET /parcels/:id/tracking scoped to current user, returning pending with no fake tracking number when no events exist.
notes.B4-14: Added PATCH /admin/parcels/:id/status with shipping:write RBAC, legal transition checks, dispatch tracking number requirement, tracking event writes, and audit logging.
notes.B4-15: Connected frontend Shipping page to live /shipping-lines, /parcels, /parcels/draft, /shipping/preview, /parcels, /shipping-payments, and tracking refresh APIs.
notes.B5-01: Added wallets migration with one wallet per user, balance cents, currency, status, timestamps, and non-negative balance guard.
notes.B5-02: Added wallet_transactions migration with signed amount_cents, reason, source, balance_after, admin creator linkage, and user/wallet indexes.
notes.B5-03: Added GET /wallet returning current user's wallet, transactions, and coupons with numeric non-NaN balance fields.
notes.B5-04: Added coupons migration with unique code, status, validity windows, fixed/percent discount rules, line eligibility, minimum shipping fee, redemption limits, and metadata.
notes.B5-05: Added user_coupons migration with user/coupon uniqueness, available/locked/used/expired/revoked states, parcel links, and timestamps.
notes.B5-06: Added POST /coupons/redeem-code with invalid, inactive, expired, duplicate, and limit-reached errors covered by tests.
notes.B5-07: Added POST /welcome-gift/claim with WELCOME_GIFT_* configuration and one-claim-per-user idempotency.
notes.B5-08: Added coupon eligibility service covering line restrictions, minimum shipping fee, non-stacking locks, inactive/expired coupons, and explanatory reasons.
notes.B5-09: Added POST /checkout/apply-coupon to lock/preauthorize a coupon against a shipping_due parcel and update backend final_fee_cents.
notes.B5-10: Integrated shipping payment webhook with coupon settle/rollback: succeeded marks used, failed/cancelled restores coupon and original parcel fee, duplicate webhook is idempotent.
notes.B5-11: Added POST /admin/coupons for operations or finance admins with audit logging and amount/percent validation.
notes.B5-12: Added PATCH /admin/wallets/:userId/credit for finance admins only, requiring reason, preventing negative balances, and writing audit plus wallet transaction.
notes.B5-13: Connected frontend Wallet and checkout coupon flows to live /wallet, /coupons/redeem-code, /welcome-gift/claim, and /checkout/apply-coupon APIs.
notes.B6-01: Added GET /admin/overview returning counts only for domains visible to the logged-in admin permissions.
notes.B6-02: Added GET /admin/orders with orders/support permissions, status filtering, limit/offset pagination, item/user context, and no internal_notes exposure.
notes.B6-03: Added PATCH /admin/orders/:id/status with orders:write RBAC, legal order transitions, haul item status sync, order_status_history writes, and audit logging.
notes.B6-04: Added PATCH /admin/orders/:id/exception with required reason, orders/support write permissions, exception status update, history write, audit logging, and risk-case suggestion metadata.
notes.B6-05: Added GET /admin/warehouse/items with warehouse read/write RBAC, status filtering, pagination, item metadata, weight, storage location, and QC photo counts.
notes.B6-06: Added GET /admin/parcels with shipping/support RBAC, pagination/filtering, latest payment context for shipping roles, and final fee/payment redaction for support-only roles.
notes.B6-07: Added GET /admin/policies with ops:policy:write RBAC and draft/published/archived CMS visibility.
notes.B6-08: Added PATCH /admin/policies/:id with version increment, publish timestamp handling, validation, and audit logging.
notes.B6-09: Replaced admin.html localStorage business data with API-backed login, overview, order, warehouse, parcel, and policy views; unauthorized modules are hidden and API errors are shown.
notes.B6-10: Added admin-console regression tests covering overview visibility, order status/exception permissions, warehouse/parcel/policy role boundaries, redaction, pagination, and OpenAPI coverage.
notes.B7-01: Added 000010_creators_campaigns.sql with creators and creator_campaigns tables, unique codes, status enums, and updated_at triggers.
notes.B7-02: Added creator_attributions table with nullable session/user/order links and an idempotent unique touch index per creator/campaign/session/touch_type.
notes.B7-03: Added POST /creator-campaign/touch. Public/optional-user endpoint records visit/signup/order touches idempotently, resolves creator or campaign codes, and never stores or returns session/user identifiers.
notes.B7-04: Added GET /creator/dashboard scoped to the current user's linked creator. Returns aggregate visit/signup/order counts and campaigns only; no buyer addresses, order lines, or QC are ever exposed. Admin creator/campaign management under ops:policy:write.
notes.B7-05: Added a Creator dashboard view to the client app (app/app.js) that loads GET /creator/dashboard, shows aggregate counts and campaigns, and guards for not-connected, no-creator (403), and error states.
notes.B7-06: Added 000011_haul_stories.sql with privacy_level and review_status enums, public-feed partial index, and the content:review:write permission seeded to support/operations/risk roles.
notes.B7-07: Added POST /haul-stories and GET /haul-stories. Only title/body/privacy are accepted from users; stories always start pending review and public visibility requires moderation.
notes.B7-08: Added GET /admin/content-review with content:review:write RBAC, status filtering, and pagination.
notes.B7-09: Added POST /admin/content-review/:id/action (approve/reject/hide) with required reason on reject/hide and audit logging, plus POST /haul-stories/:id/withdraw so authors can revoke their own stories. Withdrawn stories cannot be actioned.
notes.B7-10: Added 000012_risk_cases.sql with risk_type/status/severity/owner fields and a partial unique index that prevents duplicate active auto-generated cases per source/type/subject.
notes.B7-11: Added GET/POST /admin/risk-cases and PATCH /admin/risk-cases/:id with risk:case:write RBAC, legal status transitions, resolved_at handling, and audit logging.
notes.B7-12: Added coupon-abuse scan in the risk service. Disabled by default (RISK_COUPON_ABUSE_ENABLED), configurable threshold (RISK_COUPON_ABUSE_THRESHOLD), and idempotent auto-case creation so re-runs never duplicate open cases.
notes.B7-13: Added 000013_country_shipping_hub.sql with country/version uniqueness, status enum, published_at/expires_at, and content JSON.
notes.B7-14: Added public GET /country-shipping/:country returning only the latest published version and flagging expired content, plus admin GET/PUT /admin/country-shipping under ops:policy:write.
notes.B7-15: Added Content Review and Risk Console modules to the admin console (app/admin.js). Both are permission-gated (content:review:write, risk:case:write), hidden from unauthorized admins, and wire approve/reject/hide and risk create/status-transition actions to the live APIs.
notes.B8-01: Added scripts/check-production-env.mjs (npm run env:check) validating required prod env, blocking dev-default secrets and wildcard CORS, plus deploy/production/env-checklist.md. Exits non-zero on blocking findings.
notes.B8-02: Added scripts/db-backup.mjs (npm run db:backup) using pg_dump -Fc to an encrypted backup dir, plus deploy/production/backup-and-restore.md with a restore-drill checklist and RPO/RTO.
notes.B8-03: Added scripts/migrate-dry-run.mjs (npm run migrate:dry-run) that lists migrations and blocks destructive DDL (drop table/column, truncate, unqualified delete, alter column type) without touching a database, plus deploy/production/migration-dry-run.md expand/contract flow.
notes.B8-04: Added window.GOATEDBUY_API_BASE_URL override to client and admin apps with app/config.example.js and deploy/production/frontend-config.md so staging/prod base URLs and rollback are a static-asset swap.
notes.B8-05: Added scripts/production-smoke.mjs (npm run smoke) covering health/ready/version, user register/login/link/haul/order/qc/shipping/wallet, and optional admin login/overview against SMOKE_BASE_URL with per-step pass/fail reporting.
notes.B8-06: Added deploy/production/monitoring-and-alerts.md mapping golden signals and payment/webhook/queue/coupon-rollback alerts to the structured logs and health endpoints.
notes.B8-07: Added feature flags (FEATURE_PAYMENTS/SHIPPING/COUPONS/CREATORS_ENABLED, default on) enforced by a requireFeature middleware returning 503 FEATURE_DISABLED. Covered by feature-flags.test.js; documented in deploy/production/README.md.
notes.B8-08: Added deploy/production/rollback-runbook.md with layer-by-layer rollback (feature flag first, then API image, frontend config, DB expand/contract, payments/webhooks, shipping lines).
notes.B8-09: Added deploy/production/security-regression-checklist.md (P0) covering auth/session, RBAC and ownership scoping, redaction, payments integrity, and logging/secrets, backed by npm run ci.
notes.B8-10: Added deploy/production/release-report-template.md capturing scope, pre-flight gates, first-24h metrics, incidents, rollback, follow-ups, and learnings.
